queries.question: Show all of the articles with photos, also show the articles with videos but just those about technology.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.title 
FROM Articles
WHERE Articles.visualStorytelling = "Photo" OR Articles.visualStorytelling = "Video" AND Articles.articleType = "Technology"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
  ?articles p:visualStorytelling ?visualstorytelling_w .
  ?articles p:visualStorytelling ?visualstorytelling_w2 .
  ?articles p:articleType ?articletype_w .
  FILTER((STR(?visualstorytelling_w) = "Photo" || (STR(?visualstorytelling_w2) = "Video" && STR(?articletype_w) = "Technology")))
}

queries.question: List both articles with photos and articles with videos where any are on the subject of technology.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.title 
FROM Articles
WHERE (Articles.visualStorytelling = "Photo" OR Articles.visualStorytelling = "Video") AND Articles.articleType = "Technology"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
  ?articles p:visualStorytelling ?visualstorytelling_w .
  ?articles p:visualStorytelling ?visualstorytelling_w2 .
  ?articles p:articleType ?articletype_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?visualstorytelling_w) = "Photo" || STR(?visualstorytelling_w2) = "Video")) && STR(?articletype_w) = "Technology"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me all the articles with photos and videos related to technology.
